title: Lemon Dishwasher Freshener - (Pack of 2) - Long-Lasting & Powerful Citrus Scent for Sparkling Clean Dishes
features: INNOVATIVE DESIGN: Our lemon dishwasher freshener comes in a sleek, compact design that not only looks great in your dishwasher but also allows for easy installation and maintenance, ensuring it stays securely in place throughout each cycle.

UNMATCHED QUALITY: Made with premium materials and crafted with care, our two-pack of dishwasher fresheners promises long-lasting durability and optimal performance, ensuring your dishes stay fresh and sparkling clean wash after wash.

INVIGORATING CITRUS SCENT: Harness the power of zesty lemon to transform your dishwasher experience; the refreshing citrus scent eliminates tough odors and leaves your dishes smelling incredibly fresh, making post-meal cleanups a breeze.

PERFECT FOR ALL DISHWASHERS: Our lemon dishwasher freshener is universally compatible and designed to work with all dishwasher brands and models, providing a versatile and affordable solution for homeowners and renters alike.

LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Each lemon dishwasher freshener pack delivers up to 60 wash cycles of consistent, powerful deodorizing action, ensuring your dishes are left sparkling clean and infused with a refreshing lemon fragrance for an extended period.
description: Product Description Make your dishwasher citrus fragrance and refreshing while using this item. Directions Hang one freshener in your dishwasher and replace every 5 weeks for optimal freshness.
